text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey, guess what, Trainer! I'm gonna<n>make a hot
pot for everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But I can't decide if I should make<n>kimchi hot pot
or a mixed one. I wonder<n>if everyone's okay with
spicy food...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I was going to go with the kimchi hot<n>pot, since
it's El's favorite, but... hmm...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I know! I'll make both! Double the hot<n>pot means
double the buono! ♪
